description_long: This hammer features a robust, cylindrical metal head with a dual striking surface: one side is flat and broad for delivering forceful blows, while the opposite side is rounded, typical of a ball-peen hammer. The head is securely mounted on a smoothly contoured wooden handle, which is slightly curved and widens at the base for improved grip and control. The wood grain is visible, giving the handle a natural, polished appearance. The metal head has a matte, slightly textured finish, suggesting durability and resistance to wear. No visible branding or markings are present on the hammer. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for both metalworking and general urban tool use.
description: A ball-peen hammer with a matte metal head and a polished, contoured wooden handle. The head features both a flat striking face and a rounded peen.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the cylindrical metal head with both flat and rounded ends visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the handle and the symmetrical design of the hammer head, with both striking faces aligned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the dual-faced metal head, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the hammer head, clearly showing the flat and rounded striking surfaces and the handle's attachment point.
attribute_handle_type: contoured wooden handle, slightly curved, polished with visible wood grain, flared at the base for grip enhancement
attribute_head_type: ball-peen hammer head with one flat striking face and one rounded peen, cylindrical steel construction
